legal_entities.name: Xiaomi China placeholder entity
legal_entities.description: Placeholder legal entity for AP module.

accounting_policies.name: AP payment posting timing
accounting_policies.description: AP settlement posting occurs after bank success in this module sample.

accounting_policies.name: Monthly cut-off policy
accounting_policies.description: Accounting impact is assigned by posting timestamp and hard-closed periods reject mutation.

chart_of_accounts.name: Accounts payable placeholder
chart_of_accounts.description: Control account for AP open items.

chart_of_accounts.name: Bank cash placeholder
chart_of_accounts.description: Bank cash account for payment settlement.

tax_codes.name: Input VAT 6 percent placeholder
tax_codes.description: Input VAT placeholder tax code used by reimbursement and AP invoice examples.

approval_matrices.name: Supplier bank account change approval
approval_matrices.description: Supplier bank account change requires independent finance approval.

approval_matrices.name: Manual journal approval
approval_matrices.description: Manual journal requires independent approver before posting.

segregation_of_duties.name: Supplier bank account change and payment release conflict
segregation_of_duties.description: The actor changing supplier bank account cannot release payment to that supplier.

segregation_of_duties.name: Manual journal create and approve conflict
segregation_of_duties.description: Manual journal creator cannot approve or post the same journal.

finance_controls.name: Duplicate payment prevention
finance_controls.description: Duplicate business key or replayed payment request does not create a second payment.

finance_controls.name: Budget release once
finance_controls.description: Cancellation or failure releases occupied budget exactly once.

finance_controls.name: Closed period mutation control
finance_controls.description: Hard-closed periods reject posting, reversal, and backdated financial mutation.

integration_points.name: Bank payment callback placeholder
integration_points.description: Bank callback carries payment status, bank reference, amount, currency, and failure reason.

integration_points.name: Tax invoice status placeholder
integration_points.description: Tax platform provides invoice status, red-letter status, and tax amount.

data_observability.name: Audit log placeholder
data_observability.description: Audit evidence contains actor, timestamp, before/after values, rule id, and source document id.

data_observability.name: Voucher persistence placeholder
data_observability.description: Voucher header and lines are observable by voucher id, source document id, period, amount, and account.

historical_incidents.name: Duplicate payment placeholder incident
historical_incidents.description: Placeholder incident for duplicate payment regression coverage.

test_data_profiles.name: AP happy path placeholder data
test_data_profiles.description: Supplier, invoice, bank account, period, and budget data for AP payment regression.

test_data_profiles.name: Tax red-letter placeholder data
test_data_profiles.description: Original invoice, red-letter invoice, tax amount, and period data for tax regression.
